source_rule: Do not trade it as if it were a cash instrument
implementation_detail: It is calculated from options and is not directly tradable or cheaply replicable as the lecture uses it
caveat: Use it as a reference index for estimating VX roll, not as the traded leg

implementation_detail: If spot VIX is unchanged, a front future above spot converges downward and creates negative roll for a long
caveat: Thresholds matter; the copied source uses entryThreshold = 0.1

source_rule: VIX and ES are anti-correlated, so the hedge is same-side
implementation_detail: Short VX roll harvest is paired with short ES; long VX is paired with long ES
caveat: This is not a classic long/short pair trade

source_rule: Convert beta into dollar contract exposure
implementation_detail: The source code regresses 1000*VX against 50*ES and then uses a hedge ratio in contract-dollar terms
caveat: A lecture example can round differently; recompute from the selected regime

implementation_detail: The earlier roll-return script uses 0.35, then the regime script refines it
caveat: Existing notes that use a different approximate ratio should be kept, but this source value is the copied-code reference

implementation_detail: Do not mix pre-GFC and post-GFC clusters just to use more data
caveat: More history can be worse when the mapping changed
